channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PSX Gains 950 Points Amid Global Oil and Geopolitical Developments
item.description: On Monday, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) saw a notable recovery as the KSE-100 index gained 954.77 points, closing at 163,948.94 from the previous day’s 162,994.17. The day started positively with...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Announces Plan to Seek Opposition Presidential Nomination in 2027
item.description: Former Deputy President and DCP leader Rigathi Gachagua has officially announced his intention to vie for the opposition's presidential ticket in the 2027 General Election under the United Alternative...

item.title: Man arrested after fatally stabbing a woman in Barcelona suburb
item.description: A man was arrested on Saturday after allegedly stabbing a woman to death in Esplugues de Llobregat, a suburb of Barcelona near the Nou Camp stadium. The incident occurred around 11am in a residential ...

item.title: Selestine Nyagah Appointed as New Rauka Presenter on Citizen TV
item.description: Citizen TV’s gospel programme Rauka is on a new journey as Selestine Nyagah steps in as the show’s new host, taking over from Joyce Omondi. Nyagah, who is an actress, entrepreneur, and social media in...

item.title: Former Boxer Conjestina Achieng Seen on Streets After Rehab, Claims Lack of Support
item.description: Former Kenyan boxing champion Conjestina Achieng has once again sparked concern among Kenyans after being seen on the streets months following her rehabilitation. Conjestina, who had been receiving tr...

item.title: Pakistan’s Mediation Role in US-Iran Tensions and the Limits of Peace Talks
item.description: This opinion piece argues that Pakistan played a central and somewhat unexpected role in easing tensions between the United States and Iran following the US-Israel strikes on Iran in February. The aut...

item.title: HP Board Class 12 Results 2026: Stream-wise Toppers and Pass Percentage Announced
item.description: The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education (HPBOSE) has officially announced the Class 12 examination results for the year 2026. Students across the state eagerly awaited the declaration of the re...

item.title: PSX KSE-100 Index Recovers 954 Points as Bulls Dominate Trading Amid Rising Oil Prices
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange witnessed a strong recovery on Monday as bulls took charge and pushed the benchmark KSE-100 index up by 954.77 points, closing at 163,948.94 points. This represents a gain ...

item.title: APC's Felix Morka Calls Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso Unserious for Switching Parties Ahead of 2027
item.description: Felix Morka, di National Publicity Secretary of All Progressives Congress (APC), don call Peter Obi, Rabiu Kwankwaso and other opposition leaders 'unserious' people. He talk am on Channels Television ...

item.title: Iran defends its position at the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing US-led blockade and economic pressures
item.description: In this opinion piece, South African writer Gillian Schutte analyses the current tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has taken a firm stand against what he sees as...

item.title: George Russell maintains calm as teammate Kimi Antonelli dominates early F1 season
item.description: In the recent Miami Grand Prix, George Russell finished on the podium for the second consecutive race, while his teenage Mercedes teammate, Kimi Antonelli, secured his third straight victory of the se...

item.title: One Nation’s Rise Poses Challenges for News Corp’s Influence and Business Model
item.description: The recent surge of One Nation in Australian politics is creating significant challenges not only for traditional right-leaning parties but also for News Corp, led by Lachlan Murdoch. As voters shift ...

item.title: NWRB Implements Measures to Address Declining Dam Water Levels
item.description: The National Water Resources Board (NWRB) has put in place contingency measures in response to the significant decline in dam water levels across the country. These actions include allowing concession...

item.title: Cameron Young Clinches Cadillac Championship with Unflappable Performance
item.description: Cameron Young delivered an exceptional performance at the Cadillac Championship, leading the tournament from start to finish. Despite a self-imposed one-stroke penalty on the par-four second hole, he ...

item.title: Cameron Diaz and Benji Madden announce the birth of their third child
item.description: Cameron Diaz, aged 53, and her husband Benji Madden have welcomed their third child, Nautas Madden. The couple shared the news via Instagram, with Benji expressing their joy and gratitude for their gr...

item.title: Italy launches legal probe into Israeli detention of activists from Gaza-bound flotilla
item.description: Italian authorities have initiated an investigation into what they are calling possible unlawful detention after Israeli forces intercepted a Gaza-bound aid flotilla and detained certain activists abo...

item.title: Tanzania and Türkiye sign double taxation avoidance agreement to strengthen economic ties
item.description: Tanzania and Türkiye have officially signed a Double Taxation Agreement (DTA) aimed at avoiding double taxation and preventing fiscal evasion on income tax. This important pact makes Tanzania's 13th s...

item.title: Parker looks to secure Galaxy’s survival in the league after cup defeat
item.description: After TS Galaxy's disappointing 2-1 loss to Durban City in the Nedbank Cup final, interim coach Bernard Parker has shifted his focus to the league to avoid relegation. Galaxy had initially taken the l...

item.title: Key British elections this week highlight shifting political landscape
item.description: With elections across Britain scheduled for Thursday, the outcomes will not only determine the allocation of billions in public funds but also shape the political fortunes of leaders from local counci...

item.title: Cochrane Review Finds Anti-Amyloid Drugs Offer No Meaningful Benefit for Alzheimer’s and Increase Brain Swelling Risk
item.description: A comprehensive Cochrane systematic review analyzing data from 17 clinical trials involving over 20,000 participants has concluded that anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies, designed to clear amyloid be...
